CustomField.formula: IF( Last_Onboarding_Zoom__c >= TODAY()-7, +6, +0 ) + IF( Last_Onboarding_Connected_Call__c >= TODAY()-7, +4, +0 ) + IF( Last_Onboarding_Text__c >= TODAY()-7, +3, +0 ) + IF( Last_Onboarding_Attempted_Call__c >= TODAY()-7, +2, +0 ) + IF( Last_Onboarding_Email__c >= TODAY()-7, +1, +0 )
CustomField.label: Engagement Score Last 7 Days
